ast.source: Toggle to enable or disable link type names in the graph view.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle to enable or disable link type colors in the graph view.
ast.target: 切换以在图谱视图中启用或禁用链接类型颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle to show or hide the legend for link type colors in the graph view.

ast.name: warn
ast.source: PixiJS Warning: gl.getProgramInfoLog()
ast.target: PixiJS 警告：gl.getProgramInfoLog()

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Provided WebGL context does not have a stencil buffer, masks may not render correctly
ast.target: 提供的 WebGL 上下文没有模板缓冲区，遮罩可能无法正确渲染

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Provided WebGL context does not support 32 index buffer, complex graphics may not render correctly
ast.target: 提供的 WebGL 上下文不支持 32 位索引缓冲区，复杂图形可能无法正确渲染

ast.name: warn
ast.source: unsupported index buffer type: uint32
ast.target: 不支持的索引缓冲区类型：uint32

ast.name: warn
ast.source: TransformFeedback is not supported but TransformFeedbackVaryings are given.
ast.target: TransformFeedback 不受支持，但提供了 TransformFeedbackVaryings。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: EventBoundary cannot map a non-pointer event as a pointer event
ast.target: EventBoundary 无法将非指针事件映射为指针事件

ast.name: warn
ast.source: EventBoundary cannot map a non-wheel event as a wheel event
ast.target: EventBoundary 无法将非滚轮事件映射为滚轮事件

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Cache] already has key:
ast.target: [Cache] 已存在键：

ast.name: warn

ast.target: [Assets] 由 Assets 管理的 BaseTexture 被销毁而不是卸载！请使用 Assets.unload() 而不是销毁 BaseTexture。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Assets] A Texture managed by Assets was destroyed instead of unloaded! Use Assets.unload() instead of destroying the Texture.
ast.target: [Assets] 由 Assets 管理的 Texture 被销毁而不是卸载！请使用 Assets.unload() 而不是销毁 Texture。
